title: Test standalone entry point
description: Write tests in tests/test_standalone.py covering the pypptx.py standalone entry script. Tests must cover: (1) unit-test the bootstrap guard — mock sys.prefix to contain str(_VENV) and assert _bootstrap() returns without calling subprocess; (2) integration test invoking subprocess.run(['python3', 'pypptx.py', '--version']) from the repo root and asserting exit code 0; (3) first-run integration test using a temp copy of the repo root to assert .venv/ is created and stderr contains the bootstrap message; (4) second-run integration test asserting no bootstrap output on stderr. Also run uv run pytest to confirm all pre-existing tests still pass.
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_standalone.py exists with tests for bootstrap guard, version invocation, first-run venv creation, and second-run silence
uv run pytest passes with no regressions in the existing 159 tests
